title: Ancient DNA Extraction Apparatus
description: The user operates a steampunk-inspired mechanical DNA extraction device in a chemistry lab. A mosquito preserved in amber is clamped inside a gear-driven centrifuge apparatus, and the user must calibrate pressure, temperature, spin speed, and solvent ratios through interactive controls to successfully extract prehistoric DNA without destroying the specimen.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 (importmap with ES modules from cdn.jsdelivr.net). Load 'shared_assets/gears.glb' and 'shared_assets/MosquitoInAmber.glb' using GLTFLoader. Scene setup: a dark chemistry lab environment with a PerspectiveCamera at (0, 3, 6) looking at origin. Add ambient light (0x334455, 0.4), a warm point light (0xffaa44, 1.5) above the apparatus, and a cool directional light (0x6688cc, 0.8). Place the MosquitoInAmber model at center (0, 1, 0) scaled to roughly 1 unit. Position the gears model surrounding the amber like a mechanical clamp/centrifuge frame, scaled appropriately. Animate gears to rotate continuously at a base speed. Create an HTML overlay panel styled as a brass laboratory console with these 7 interactive steps requiring parameter validation: (1) A 'Power' toggle button that starts gear rotation and enables controls. (2) A 'Clamp Pressure' slider (0-100 PSI) — must be set between 40-60 PSI or amber cracks (flash red warning). (3) A 'Temperature' slider (0-200°C) — must be between 85-95°C for optimal extraction. (4) A 'Spin Speed' slider (0-5000 RPM) — valid range 2000-3000 RPM; gear rotation speed visually matches this value. (5) A 'Solvent Ratio' dual slider for ethanol/buffer ratio — ethanol must be 60-75%. (6) A 'UV Exposure' button that toggles a purple point light (0x8800ff) illuminating the amber with emissive glow effect on the amber material. (7) An 'Extract' button enabled only when all parameters are valid — triggers a 3-second animation where gears spin faster, a green particle system (BufferGeometry points) spirals upward from the amber representing DNA strands, and a success message appears. Display real-time validation with green checkmarks or red X icons next to each parameter. If Extract is pressed with invalid params, show specific error messages. Add OrbitControls for camera interaction. Use a subtle fog (0x111118) for atmosphere.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  powerEnabled: boolean,         // whether the apparatus is powered on
  clampPressure: number,         // current pressure in PSI (0-100)
  temperature: number,         // current temperature in Celsius (0-200)
  spinSpeed: number,         // current rotation speed in RPM (0-5000)
  solventRatio: number,         // ratio of solvent mixture (0-100%)
  extractionProgress: number,         // percentage of DNA extraction completed (0-100)
  amberIntegrity: number,         // structural integrity of amber sample (0-100)
  validationErrors: number,         // count of parameter validation failures
  gearRotationAngle: number,         // cumulative rotation angle of gears in radians
  extractionComplete: boolean,         // whether extraction process finished successfully
  totalRuntime: number,         // elapsed time since power enabled in milliseconds
  optimalParametersAchieved: boolean,         // whether all parameters are in valid ranges
}
